Browser note: design-system detections need injected DESIGN.md context, so this page only shows global/browser findings. Use the CLI or hook tests to exercise the design-system rules.
Flag Font Unsupported
Flag Color Hot Pink
Flag Background Cyan
Flag Border Teal
Flag Radius Eighteen
Flag Font Size Twelve Point Five
Flag Google Font Source
Pass Display Font
Pass Rem Font Size
Pass Relative Font Size
Pass Generic Font
Pass Token Color
Pass Alpha Color
Pass Close Color
Pass Ramp Color
Pass Zero Radius
Pass Percent Radius
Pass Scale Radius
Pass Mid Pill Radius
Pass Pill Radius
